code:
import io
import string
import list

fn is_ws(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Bool
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(b)
    b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
  when None
    false
  end
end

fn parse_tokens(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    while i < n and is_ws(s, i)
      i = i + 1
    end
    if i < n
      mut j = i
      while j < n and not is_ws(s, j)
        j = j + 1
      end
      let tok = string.substring(s, i, j)
      match string.parse_int(tok)
      when Some(v)
        result = list.push(result, v)
      when None
        ()
      end
      i = j
    end
  end
  result
end

fn remove_one(_ xs: List<Int>, _ v: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut out: List<Int> = []
  mut removed = false
  for y in xs
    if removed
      out = list.push(out, y)
    else
      if y == v
        removed = true
      else
        out = list.push(out, y)
      end
    end
  end
  out
end

fn sort_asc(_ xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut remaining = xs
  mut sorted: List<Int> = []
  while remaining.len() > 0
    match list.min(remaining)
    when Some(v)
      sorted = list.push(sorted, v)
      remaining = remove_one(remaining, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  sorted
end

fn intersect(_ xs: List<Int>, _ ys: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  for x in xs
    if list.contains(ys, x) and not list.contains(result, x)
      result = list.push(result, x)
    end
  end
  sort_asc(result)
end

fn read_input_line() -> String
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
end

let line1 = read_input_line()
let line2 = read_input_line()
let xs = parse_tokens(line1)
let ys = parse_tokens(line2)
let result = intersect(xs, ys)

if result.len() == 0
  println("empty")
else
  mut out = ""
  mut first = true
  for v in result
    if first
      out = "#{v}"
      first = false
    else
      out = "#{out} #{v}"
    end
  end
  println(out)
end
